metadata.defaultDescription: Building scalable software at the speed of AI. Backend, full-stack web, Flutter, and AI/ML integration — production-ready architecture.

home.title: Ali Salloum
home.tagline: Building scalable software at the speed of AI. Full-Stack Architect specialized in accelerated delivery.
home.equationCaption: Leveraging generative AI as a force multiplier to ship high-fidelity architectures in record time without compromising on system integrity.
home.serviceBackendDesc: Distributed systems and microservices designed for 99.9% uptime and extreme scale.
home.serviceFullstackDesc: End-to-end product development with polished UI/UX and seamless state management.
home.serviceMobileDesc: Cross-platform apps with native feel, solid offline strategy, and backend integration.
home.serviceAiDesc: Embedding LLMs and predictive models into your workflows for automated value.
home.case1Desc: A high-performance trading platform handling 50k+ events per second.
home.case2Desc: Automating marketing workflows with RAG-based LLM architectures.
home.bottomCtaBody: Whether you need a fractional CTO or a full-stack execution partner, let's discuss how AI-accelerated development can scale your product.

services.metaDescription: Backend, full-stack web, Flutter mobile, and AI/ML integration — timelines, pricing guidance, and how we work.
services.heroSubtitle: High-performance engineering for the next generation of digital products — from deep backend systems to intelligent mobile experiences.
services.trustTimezoneBody: Moscow UTC+3 — overlap with Europe & MENA.
services.trustResponseBody: Replies within < 12 hours for serious inquiries.
services.pricingBody: Discovery calls are free. Typical engagements start around $5k; most product builds fall in the $15k–$80k range depending on scope, SLA, and timeline. Fixed quotes after architecture review.
services.s1Desc: REST/GraphQL, database design, microservices, and high-concurrency infrastructure.
services.s2Desc: Flutter apps for iOS and Android with backend integration and offline-first patterns where needed.
services.s3Desc: SaaS, admin dashboards, and complete web products from UI to production deployment.
services.s4Desc: LLM integration, RAG, chatbots, and data pipelines — production-hardened, not demos.
services.closingBody: Schedule a free 30-minute technical discovery call to discuss architecture and roadmap.

portfolio.metaDescription: Anonymized case studies: architecture, scale, and how problems were solved — NDA-safe highlights.
portfolio.heroSubtitle: AI-Accelerated Full-Stack Architect — scalability, security, and production-readiness.
portfolio.p1Body: P99 latency is a requirement. Compute is optimized for cost and speed.
portfolio.p2Body: Security in schema, network topology, and CI/CD — not bolted on at the end.
portfolio.p3Body: Stateless services and distributed state from ten users to ten million.
portfolio.ctaBody: Let's discuss production-ready architecture for your performance and security needs.

c1.title: High-Frequency Trading Gateway
c1.body: Legacy WebSockets failed under peak volatility. Shipped a Go-based microservice design with Redis Pub/Sub backplane.

c2.title: Multi-Tenant CMS Engine
c2.body: Horizontally scalable content engine for a global publishing house.

c3.title: Vector Search Pipeline
c3.body: Cut embedding cost ~40% via intelligent batching.

c4.title: Zero-Trust Identity Provider
c4.body: Unified 15 fragmented auth systems into one OAuth2/OIDC core.

c5.title: Autoscaling Inventory Sync
c5.body: 5M+ SKUs across 12 warehouses with real-time consistency.

about.metaDescription: From competitive programming to AI-augmented full-stack delivery — background, credentials, and how I work with LLMs.
about.heroSubtitle: AI-Accelerated Full-Stack Architect. Bridging conceptual complexity and production-ready systems at speed.
about.j1Body: Competitive programming forged algorithmic discipline — performance and correctness still drive my architecture choices.
about.j2Body: Computer Science degree: OS, compilers, and the theory behind reliable systems.
about.j3Body: Decentralized systems and cross-platform apps for complex domains.
about.j4Body: Today: advanced AI workflows multiply output while architecture stays scalable, secure, and production-grade.
about.philosophyBody: Production quality without sacrificing speed. LLM-assisted delivery, automated tests, and AI-assisted review — robust architectures in days, not months.

contact.metaDescription: Start a project or book a discovery call. Email, Telegram, or the form — I respond within 12 hours.
contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your product, timeline, and constraints. I reply within 12 hours (Moscow UTC+3).
